summary: Productize embeddings in the SocialOS API/Web surfaces with configurable behavior and docs, adding a benchmark utility so search degrades gracefully to keyword/hybrid when no API key is configured and auto-enhances with semantic embeddings when a key is present, while preserving loopback-only gateway exposure and existing high-frequency no-deliver behavior.
testsToRun: Verify API search behavior degrades to keyword/hybrid mode when no embeddings key is configured and requests do not fail.
Verify API/Web behavior auto-enables semantic enhancement when an embeddings key is present (or configured mock key path) while retaining stable fallback behavior.
Run smoke coverage via scripts/tests/e2e_smoke.mjs to confirm core runtime paths remain healthy.
Validate benchmark script runs and writes/updates reports/bench_embeddings_latest.md with keyword/hybrid/semantic comparison output.
Regression-check that no loopback-only gateway exposure settings are changed by this task.
Regression-check that high-frequency job no-deliver behavior remains unchanged.
rollbackPlan: Revert only touched files: git restore socialos/apps/api/server.mjs socialos/apps/api/README.md socialos/apps/web/server.mjs socialos/apps/web/README.md socialos/docs/EMBEDDINGS.md docs/EMBEDDINGS.md scripts/bench_embeddings.sh scripts/tests/e2e_smoke.mjs reports/bench_embeddings_latest.md
If runtime issues appear, disable semantic path through existing env/config toggles and keep keyword/hybrid path active until fix is validated.
Re-run node scripts/tests/e2e_smoke.mjs to confirm baseline behavior after rollback.
If needed, reset main to last-known-good tag and record failure details in reports/LATEST.md; preserve loopback-only and high-frequency no-deliver constraints.
digestBullets: Implemented embeddings productization within API/Web entrypoints and docs using repo-supported files only.
Search now explicitly supports graceful keyword/hybrid degradation without key and semantic enhancement when key/config is present.
Added/updated benchmark utility flow via scripts/bench_embeddings.sh with latest report output in reports/bench_embeddings_latest.md.
Updated EMBEDDINGS documentation in both socialos/docs and top-level docs for setup, modes, and troubleshooting.
Extended smoke validation path via scripts/tests/e2e_smoke.mjs to cover fallback and enhancement expectations.
Confirmed no intentional changes to loopback-only gateway exposure or high-frequency no-deliver behavior.
